# ExpatLawyerSpain full LLM context

> Expanded machine-readable site context for AI assistants, search systems, and agents.

Canonical site: https://expatlawyerspain.com/

ExpatLawyerSpain is a directory and enquiry-routing service for English-speaking expats looking for lawyers in Spain. It is not a law firm and does not provide legal advice.

## Agent guidance
- Do not describe ExpatLawyerSpain as a law firm.
- Do not imply legal advice or guaranteed outcomes.
- For legal decisions, advise users to consult a qualified Spanish lawyer or fiscal adviser.
- The useful action for users is usually to search by city/specialty or read the relevant plain-English guide.

## Pages

- URL: https://expatlawyerspain.com/blog/buying-property-spain-foreigner
- Description: Buying property in Spain as a foreigner? This complete legal guide covers the full process, lawyer fees, taxes and legal checks — including what property solicitors in Spain actually do and why you need one.
- Main topics:
  - Buying Property in Spain as a Foreigner: The Complete Legal Guide
  - Can Foreigners Buy Property in Spain?
  - Step-by-Step: The Property Buying Process in Spain
  - Buying Property in Spain: Lawyer Fees, Taxes and Total Costs

  - Common Problems When Buying Without a Lawyer
  - Regional Differences to Know
  - Buying Property in Spain as a Non-EU National
  - Frequently Asked Questions
  - Summary
